2606.10921.title: Trace Only What You Need: Structure-Aware On-Demand Hypergraph Memory for Long-Document Question Answering
2606.10921.paper_summary: Long-document question answering (QA) requires large language models (LLMs) to reason over evidence scattered across lengthy documents, where answers often depend on event order, section-level context, and cross-part evidence connections. Although retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) reduces the input context by retrieving relevant evidence, existing structured RAG methods still face three limitations: costly query-agnostic knowledge organization, insufficient use of original document structure, and no reuse of historical reasoning experience. To address these limitations, we propose DocTrace, a multi-agent RAG framework for long-document QA that supports query-triggered knowledge organization, document-structure-aware and experience-guided reasoning. DocTrace preserves document hierarchy with a lightweight document structural tree index, constructs agent-shared hypergraph-structured working memory on demand during reasoning, and stores successful reasoning plans in graph-structured experience memory for future reuse, enabling adaptive exploration across related long-document questions. Experiments on four long-document QA datasets show that DocTrace achieves the best performance on three datasets, surpassing the strongest baseline, ComoRAG, by up to 8.85% in F1 and 4.40% in EM, while reducing the overall computational cost by 53.32%
2606.10921.paper_summary_zh: 長文問題回答（QA）需要大型語言模型（LLMs）對散布在冗長文檔中的證據進行推理，答案通常依賴於事件順序、部分級上下文和跨部分的證據連結。儘管檢索增強生成（RAG）通過檢索相關證據來減少輸入上下文，但現有的結構化RAG方法仍面臨三個限制：昂貴的查詢無關知識組織、對原始文檔結構的使用不足以及無法重用歷史推理經驗。為了解決這些限制，我們提出了DocTrace，一個支持查詢觸發的知識組織、文檔結構感知和經驗指導推理的多代理RAG框架。DocTrace通過輕量級文檔結構樹索引保留文檔層級，根據需求在推理過程中構建代理共享的超圖結構工作記憶，並將成功的推理計劃存儲在圖結構經驗記憶中以供未來重用，從而實現對相關長文檔問題的自適應探索。在四個長文檔QA數據集上的實驗表明，DocTrace在三個數據集上達到了最佳性能，F1指標超過最強基準ComoRAG達8.85%，EM指標達4.40%，同時將整體計算成本降低了53.32%。
2606.10921.author: Xiangjun Zai et.al.
2606.10921.authors: Xiangjun Zai, Xingyu Tan, Chen Chen, Xiaoyang Wang, Wenjie Zhang
